response: This Python function implements the naive O(mnp) triple-nested loop standard matrix multiplication algorithm, computing the product of two compatible input matrices A (m rows × n columns) and B (n rows × p columns) to return an m×p result matrix. Each entry `result[i][j]` in the output is calculated as the dot product of A's i-th row and B's j-th column, summing the products of matching elements across the shared inner dimension n to produce the correct matrix product entry.
